posts.excerpt: Micron, a GREAT American Company, announced that they are putting in 250 Million Dollars into the Trump Accounts...and their stock went up 9 points today. Thank you Micron!
posts.rationale: Trump directly praises Micron as a 'GREAT American Company,' highlights a $250M investment, and notes the stock's positive move — a clear bullish endorsement of a specific publicly-traded company.

posts.excerpt: Micron, a truly GREAT American Company...has announced a HISTORIC $250 MILLION Investment in TRUMP ACCOUNTS.
posts.rationale: Trump directly praises Micron and its CEO, announcing a major corporate investment — a clear bullish statement about a specific listed company.
